<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="cs">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Kalendář">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#1a1a2e">
<title>Kalendář</title>
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  :root {
    --top: env(safe-area-inset-top, 48px);
    --bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 34px);
    --blue: #2563EB;
    --radius: 16px;
    --bg: #F2F2F7; --card: #fff; --text: #1C1C1E;
    --sub: #6B7280; --free: #C4C4C6; --sep: #E5E7EB; --loc: #444; --loc-color: #8a6a00;
  }
  html.dark {
    --bg: #1C1C1E; --card: #2C2C2E; --text: #F2F2F7;
    --sub: #9CA3AF; --free: #555; --sep: #3A3A3C; --loc: #F0F0F0; --loc-color: #1C1C1E;
  }
  html, body { background: var(--bg); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', sans-serif; -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; transition: background 0.3s; }
  body { overflow-y: auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; }

  .header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; background: linear-gradient(160deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 60%, #1e3a8a 100%); padding: calc(var(--top) + 4px) 16px 12px; }
  .header-top { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 6px; }
  .nav-btn { width: 46px; height: 46px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.13); border: none; border-radius: 14px; color: #fff; font-size: 26px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .nav-btn:active { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.28); }
  .month-title { text-align: center; flex: 1; }
  .month-name { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; letter-spacing: -0.5px; }
  .year-label { font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin-top: 2px; }
  .toolbar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 8px 0 0; gap: 6px; }
  .today-btn { background: rgba(37,99,235,0.6); border: none; border-radius: 12px; color: #fff; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; padding: 8px 14px; cursor: pointer; }
  .today-btn:active { background: rgba(37,99,235,0.85); }
  .icon-btn { width: 38px; height: 38px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.13); border: none; border-radius: 10px; color: #fff; font-size: 18px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
  .icon-btn:active { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.28); }
  .icon-btn.active { background: rgba(37,99,235,0.7); }
  .search-bar { padding: 8px 16px 10px; background: linear-gradient(160deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 60%, #1e3a8a 100%); display: none; }
  .search-bar.open { display: block; }
  .search-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color: #fff; font-size: 17px; outline: none; font-family: -apple-system, sans-serif; }
  .search-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); }

  .content { padding: 14px 12px calc(var(--bottom) + 90px); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
  .month-divider { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); padding: 6px 4px 2px; letter-spacing: -0.3px; }

  .day-card { background: var(--card); border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.07); transition: background 0.3s; }

  /* Klikatelná hlavička dne */
  .day-head { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 16px 20px 14px; cursor: pointer; -webkit-user-select: none; }
  .day-head:active { background: rgba(37,99,235,0.06); }

  /* Hint "+ přidat" */
  .add-hint { font-size: 13px; color: #2563EB; font-weight: 600; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; margin-left: auto; padding-left: 8px; white-space: nowrap; }
  .day-head:active .add-hint { opacity: 1; }

  .day-num { font-size: 40px; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; color: var(--text); flex-shrink: 0; width: 54px; text-align: center; }
  .day-card.weekend .day-num { color: #2563EB; }
  .day-card.today .day-num { background: #2563EB; color: #fff !important; border-radius: 14px; width: 58px; height: 58px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 34px; }
  .day-info { flex: 1; }
  .day-name { font-size: 21px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); }
  .day-card.weekend .day-name { color: #2563EB; }
  .day-card.today .day-name { color: #2563EB; }
  .day-free { font-size: 17px; color: var(--free); margin-top: 2px; }

  .event-block { margin: 0 12px 12px; border-radius: 16px; padding: 14px 56px 14px 16px; border-left: 6px solid; position: relative; }
  .event-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.25; }
  .event-time { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; margin-top: 6px; }
  .event-note { font-size: 17px; color: var(--loc); margin-top: 3px; font-style: italic; }
  .event-location { font-size: 19px; color: var(--loc-color); margin-top: 4px; font-weight: 700;  }
  .event-delete { position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; height: 34px; min-width: 34px; border-radius: 17px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.08); border: none; color: #888; font-size: 19px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0 8px; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s, min-width 0.2s; }
  .event-delete.confirm { background: #FF3B30; color: #fff; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; min-width: 68px; }

  .add-fab { position: fixed; bottom: calc(var(--bottom) + 20px); right: 20px; width: 62px; height: 62px; background: #2563EB; border: none; border-radius: 50%; color: #fff; font-size: 34px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(37,99,235,0.5); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 200; }
  .add-fab:active { background: #1d4ed8; transform: scale(0.95); }

  .modal-overlay { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index: 300; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; }
  .modal-overlay.open { display: flex; }
  .modal { background: var(--bg); width: 100%; border-radius: 24px 24px 0 0; padding: 20px 20px calc(var(--bottom) + 20px); max-height: 90vh; overflow-y: auto; }
  .modal-title { font-size: 21px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 18px; text-align: center; }
  .form-group { margin-bottom: 12px; }
  .form-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--sub); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px; margin-bottom: 5px; display: block; }
  .form-input { width: 100%; padding: 13px 15px; border-radius: 13px; border: none; background: var(--card); font-size: 17px; color: var(--text); outline: none; font-family: -apple-system, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
  .form-input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37,99,235,0.2); }
  .day-range { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; }
  .day-range .form-input { flex: 1; }
  .day-range-sep { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--sub); flex-shrink: 0; }
  .color-picker { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .color-btn { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; border: 3px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s; }
  .color-btn.selected { border-color: var(--text); transform: scale(1.15); }
  .modal-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-top: 18px; }
  .btn-cancel { flex: 1; padding: 15px; border-radius: 13px; border: none; background: var(--sep); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); cursor: pointer; }
  .btn-save { flex: 2; padding: 15px; border-radius: 13px; border: none; background: #2563EB; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; cursor: pointer; }
  .btn-save:active { background: #1d4ed8; }
  .no-results { text-align: center; padding: 40px 20px; font-size: 18px; color: var(--sub); }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="header">
  <div class="header-top">
    <button class="nav-btn" id="prevBtn">&#8249;</button>
    <div class="month-title">
      <div class="month-name" id="monthName"></div>
      <div class="year-label" id="yearLabel"></div>
    </div>
    <button class="nav-btn" id="nextBtn">&#8250;</button>
  </div>
  <div class="toolbar">
    <button class="today-btn" id="todayBtn">Dnes</button>
    <button class="icon-btn" id="overviewBtn" title="Přehled">📋</button>
    <button class="icon-btn" id="searchBtn" title="Hledat">🔍</button>
    <button class="icon-btn" id="darkBtn" title="Tmavý režim">🌙</button>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="search-bar" id="searchBar">
  <input class="search-input" id="searchInput" type="text" placeholder="Hledat událost…">
</div>
<div class="content" id="content"></div>
<button class="add-fab" id="addBtn">+</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" id="modalOverlay">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-title">Nová událost</div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Název události</label>
      <input class="form-input" id="evLabel" type="text" placeholder="např. Slovensko">
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Den od – do</label>
      <div class="day-range">
        <input class="form-input" id="evDayFrom" type="number" min="1" max="31" placeholder="Od">
        <span class="day-range-sep">–</span>
        <input class="form-input" id="evDayTo" type="number" min="1" max="31" placeholder="Do">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Čas (nepovinné)</label>
      <input class="form-input" id="evTime" type="text" placeholder="např. 14:00–16:00">
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Místo (nepovinné)</label>
      <input class="form-input" id="evLocation" type="text" placeholder="např. Bratislava">
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Poznámka (nepovinné)</label>
      <input class="form-input" id="evNote" type="text" placeholder="např. Vzít kostým">
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Barva</label>
      <div class="color-picker" id="colorPicker"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-cancel" id="cancelBtn">Zrušit</button>
      <button class="btn-save" id="saveBtn">Uložit</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const MONTHS = ["Leden","Únor","Březen","Duben","Květen","Červen","Červenec","Srpen","Září","Říjen","Listopad","Prosinec"];
const DAY_NAMES = ["Neděle","Pondělí","Úterý","Středa","Čtvrtek","Pátek","Sobota"];
const COLORS = [
  {color:"#007AFF",bg:"#EEF4FF"},{color:"#AF52DE",bg:"#F9F0FF"},
  {color:"#FF9500",bg:"#FFFBEB"},{color:"#34C759",bg:"#F0FFF4"},
  {color:"#FF3B30",bg:"#FFF0F0"},{color:"#FF2D55",bg:"#FFF0F5"},
  {color:"#5856D6",bg:"#F0F0FF"},{color:"#00C7BE",bg:"#F0FFFF"},
];
const FIXED_EVENTS = {
  "2026-7-1":  [{label:"Who Cares",time:"19:00–21:00",location:"Státní opera",color:"#007AFF",bg:"#EEF4FF",img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"}],
  "2026-7-15": [{label:"Natáčení: Pán prstenů",time:"10:00–14:00 & 15:00–19:00",location:"Hostivař",color:"#AF52DE",bg:"#F9F0FF"}],
  "2026-7-16": [{label:"Natáčení: Pán prstenů",time:"10:00–14:00 & 15:00–19:00",location:"Hostivař",color:"#AF52DE",bg:"#F9F0FF"}],
  "2026-7-17": [{label:"Natáčení: Horáček",time:"14:00–18:00",location:"Hostivař",color:"#AF52DE",bg:"#F9F0FF"}],
};

const today = new Date();
let cur = {y:today.getFullYear(), m:today.getMonth()};
let selectedColor = COLORS[0];
let overviewMode = false, searchMode = false, darkMode = false, searchQuery = "";

function loadUserEvents(){ try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("userEvents")||"{}");}catch(e){return{};} }
function saveUserEvents(evs){ localStorage.setItem("userEvents",JSON.stringify(evs)); }
function key(y,m,d){ return `${y}-${m+1}-${d}`; }
function getAllEvents(y,m,d){ const k=key(y,m,d); return [...(FIXED_EVENTS[k]||[]),...(loadUserEvents()[k]||[])]; }

function openAddForDay(d, m, y) {
  document.getElementById("evLabel").value = "";
  document.getElementById("evDayFrom").value = d;
  document.getElementById("evDayTo").value = d;
  document.getElementById("evTime").value = "";
  document.getElementById("evLocation").value = "";
  document.getElementById("evNote").value = "";
  // Nastav aktuální měsíc na ten správný
  cur.y = y; cur.m = m;
  document.getElementById("modalOverlay").classList.add("open");
  setTimeout(() => document.getElementById("evLabel").focus(), 300);
}

function renderMonth(y, m, container, showEmpty) {
  const dim = new Date(y,m+1,0).getDate();
  for(let d=1; d<=dim; d++){
    const evs = getAllEvents(y,m,d);
    if(!showEmpty && evs.length===0) continue;
    if(searchQuery){
      const match = evs.some(e=>e.label.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery)||(e.location||"").toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery)||(e.note||"").toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery));
      if(!match) continue;
    }
    const dow = new Date(y,m,d).getDay();
    const isWeekend = dow===0||dow===6;
    const isToday = d===today.getDate()&&m===today.getMonth()&&y===today.getFullYear();
    const fixedCount = (FIXED_EVENTS[key(y,m,d)]||[]).length;

    const card = document.createElement("div");
    card.className = "day-card"+(isWeekend?" weekend":"")+(isToday?" today":"");
    if(isToday&&!searchQuery) card.id="today-card";

    let html = `<div class="day-head" onclick="openAddForDay(${d},${m},${y})">
      <div class="day-num">${d}</div>
      <div class="day-info">
        <div class="day-name">${DAY_NAMES[dow]}</div>
        ${evs.length===0?`<div class="day-free">Volno</div>`:""}
      </div>
      <div class="add-hint">+ přidat</div>
    </div>`;

    evs.forEach((ev,idx)=>{
      const isUser = idx>=fixedCount;
      const loc = ev.location?(ev.location.startsWith("📍")?ev.location:"📍 "+ev.location):"";
      html += `<div class="event-block" style="border-color:${ev.color};background:${ev.bg};${ev.img?'padding-right:110px;':''}">
        ${ev.img?`<img src="${ev.img}" style="position:absolute;right:12px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:90px;height:60px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:10px;opacity:0.45;">`:""}
        <div class="event-title" style="color:${ev.color}">${ev.label}</div>
        ${ev.time?`<div class="event-time" style="color:${ev.color}">${ev.time}</div>`:""}
        ${loc?`<div class="event-location">${loc}</div>`:""}
        ${ev.note?`<div class="event-note">${ev.note}</div>`:""}
        ${isUser?`<button class="event-delete" data-key="${key(y,m,d)}" data-idx="${idx-fixedCount}">×</button>`:""}
      </div>`;
    });

    card.innerHTML = html;
    container.appendChild(card);
  }
}

function render() {
  const {y,m} = cur;
  document.getElementById("monthName").textContent = MONTHS[m];
  document.getElementById("yearLabel").textContent = y;
  const content = document.getElementById("content");
  content.innerHTML = "";

  if(overviewMode){
    for(let mi=-1;mi<=1;mi++){
      let ry=y, rm=m+mi;
      if(rm<0){rm=11;ry--;} if(rm>11){rm=0;ry++;}
      const div=document.createElement("div"); div.className="month-divider";
      div.textContent=MONTHS[rm]+" "+ry; content.appendChild(div);
      renderMonth(ry,rm,content,false);
    }
  } else if(searchQuery){
    let found=false;
    for(let mi=0;mi<12;mi++){
      const before=content.children.length;
      renderMonth(y,mi,content,false);
      if(content.children.length>before){
        const div=document.createElement("div"); div.className="month-divider";
        div.textContent=MONTHS[mi]+" "+y;
        content.insertBefore(div,content.children[before]);
        found=true;
      }
    }
    if(!found) content.innerHTML=`<div class="no-results">Nic nenalezeno</div>`;
  } else {
    renderMonth(y,m,content,true);
  }

  document.querySelectorAll(".event-delete").forEach(btn=>{
    btn.addEventListener("click",function(e){
      e.stopPropagation();
      if(!this.classList.contains("confirm")){
        this.classList.add("confirm"); this.textContent="Smazat?";
        setTimeout(()=>{ if(this.classList.contains("confirm")){this.classList.remove("confirm");this.textContent="×";} },3000);
      } else { deleteEvent(this.dataset.key,parseInt(this.dataset.idx)); }
    });
  });

  if(!overviewMode&&!searchQuery){
    if(m===today.getMonth()&&y===today.getFullYear()){
      setTimeout(()=>{ const el=document.getElementById("today-card"); if(el){ const offset = el.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY - document.querySelector(".header").offsetHeight - 10; window.scrollTo({top: offset, behavior: "smooth"}); } },80);
    } else { window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:"smooth"}); }
  }
}

function deleteEvent(k,idx){
  const evs=loadUserEvents();
  if(evs[k]){ evs[k].splice(idx,1); if(!evs[k].length) delete evs[k]; saveUserEvents(evs); render(); }
}

// Tmavý režim
function applyDark(val){ darkMode=val; document.documentElement.classList.toggle("dark",val); localStorage.setItem("darkMode",val?"1":"0"); document.getElementById("darkBtn").textContent=val?"☀️":"🌙"; }
document.getElementById("darkBtn").addEventListener("click",()=>applyDark(!darkMode));
if(localStorage.getItem("darkMode")==="1") applyDark(true);

// Přehled
document.getElementById("overviewBtn").addEventListener("click",()=>{
  overviewMode=!overviewMode; searchQuery=""; document.getElementById("searchInput").value="";
  document.getElementById("searchBar").classList.remove("open"); searchMode=false;
  document.getElementById("overviewBtn").classList.toggle("active",overviewMode);
  document.getElementById("searchBtn").classList.remove("active"); render();
});

// Hledání
document.getElementById("searchBtn").addEventListener("click",()=>{
  searchMode=!searchMode; overviewMode=false;
  document.getElementById("overviewBtn").classList.remove("active");
  document.getElementById("searchBtn").classList.toggle("active",searchMode);
  document.getElementById("searchBar").classList.toggle("open",searchMode);
  if(searchMode) document.getElementById("searchInput").focus();
  else { searchQuery=""; document.getElementById("searchInput").value=""; render(); }
});
document.getElementById("searchInput").addEventListener("input",function(){ searchQuery=this.value.trim().toLowerCase(); render(); });

// Navigace
document.getElementById("prevBtn").addEventListener("click",()=>{ cur.m--; if(cur.m<0){cur.m=11;cur.y--;} overviewMode=false; document.getElementById("overviewBtn").classList.remove("active"); render(); });
document.getElementById("nextBtn").addEventListener("click",()=>{ cur.m++; if(cur.m>11){cur.m=0;cur.y++;} overviewMode=false; document.getElementById("overviewBtn").classList.remove("active"); render(); });
document.getElementById("todayBtn").addEventListener("click",()=>{ cur={y:today.getFullYear(),m:today.getMonth()}; overviewMode=false; document.getElementById("overviewBtn").classList.remove("active"); render(); });

// Modal
const modal=document.getElementById("modalOverlay");
document.getElementById("addBtn").addEventListener("click",()=>{
  ["evLabel","evDayFrom","evDayTo","evTime","evLocation","evNote"].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id).value="");
  document.getElementById("evDayFrom").value=""; document.getElementById("evDayTo").value="";
  modal.classList.add("open");
});
document.getElementById("cancelBtn").addEventListener("click",()=>modal.classList.remove("open"));
modal.addEventListener("click",e=>{ if(e.target===modal) modal.classList.remove("open"); });

document.getElementById("saveBtn").addEventListener("click",()=>{
  const label=document.getElementById("evLabel").value.trim();
  const dayFrom=parseInt(document.getElementById("evDayFrom").value);
  const dayTo=parseInt(document.getElementById("evDayTo").value)||dayFrom;
  const time=document.getElementById("evTime").value.trim();
  const location=document.getElementById("evLocation").value.trim();
  const note=document.getElementById("evNote").value.trim();
  if(!label||!dayFrom||dayFrom<1||dayFrom>31){alert("Vyplňte název a den.");return;}
  if(dayTo<dayFrom){alert("Koncový den musí být stejný nebo vyšší.");return;}
  const evs=loadUserEvents();
  const dim=new Date(cur.y,cur.m+1,0).getDate();
  for(let d=dayFrom;d<=Math.min(dayTo,dim);d++){
    const k=key(cur.y,cur.m,d);
    if(!evs[k]) evs[k]=[];
    evs[k].push({label,time,location,note,color:selectedColor.color,bg:selectedColor.bg});
  }
  saveUserEvents(evs); modal.classList.remove("open"); render();
});

// Barvy
const cp=document.getElementById("colorPicker");
COLORS.forEach((c,i)=>{
  const btn=document.createElement("button");
  btn.className="color-btn"+(i===0?" selected":"");
  btn.style.background=c.color;
  btn.addEventListener("click",()=>{ selectedColor=c; cp.querySelectorAll(".color-btn").forEach(b=>b.classList.remove("selected")); btn.classList.add("selected"); });
  cp.appendChild(btn);
});

render();
</script>
</body>
</html>
